title: ジャパンカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the great autumn race, the Japan
Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio feels like she's grown after all the
hardships she's gone through.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is her big day. She heads toward the track
filled with energy and drive.
